gist.headline: Lab coats and algorithms
gist.blurb: Benchside has sprouted in our community greenhouse! It's a new AI biomedical assistant ready to help researchers and medical pros analyze documents and dive into pharmaceutical data.
gist.summary: Added Benchside, an AI-powered biomedical assistant for researchers and medical professionals, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: The community can now discover Benchside in the apps directory, offering specialized AI tools for biomedical research and document analysis.
gist.visual_concept: Benchside is a biomedical assistant added to the greenhouse. Visuals should combine biology/lab equipment (microscopes, test tubes) with the greenhouse/plant motif. Polly the bee wearing a tiny lab coat or safety goggles.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny safety goggles and a white lab coat, examining a glowing lime green (#ecf874) test tube in a cozy greenhouse laboratory. A chunky retro computer monitor nearby displays a DNA helix. Soft pastel gradient background with mint and lavender. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
